message:
test: add dead-style-token audit ensuring every STYLE_* constant is wired and non-default

Add a comprehensive style token audit test suite (bead 2dccg.1.3) that
prevents style token rot — constants that are defined but never referenced
in rendering code, or that resolve to empty/unstyled output.

Key additions:

- ALL_STYLE_TOKENS registry: a complete mapping of every `pub const STYLE_*`
  declaration in the module, kept in sync via the companion test
  `style_token_registry_is_complete` which reads the source file and
  cross-checks against the registry

- INDIRECT_USE_WHITELIST: tokens consumed via helper methods (e.g.
  score_style() dispatches to STYLE_SCORE_HIGH/MID/LOW based on numeric
  thresholds) that won't appear as direct `style_system::STYLE_*` literals
  in rendering code — each entry requires a justification comment

- `style_token_registry_is_complete`: parses `pub const STYLE_*: &str`
  declarations from the source file and asserts bidirectional consistency
  with the ALL_STYLE_TOKENS registry — catches both missing and stale entries

- `no_dead_style_tokens`: reads all `.rs` files under src/ui/ (excluding
  style_system.rs itself for definitions, but including it for internal
  method references) and asserts every non-whitelisted token constant name
  appears in at least one rendering context

- `all_tokens_resolve_to_non_default_style`: iterates every token across
  every UiThemePreset and asserts the resolved Style has at minimum an fg
  or bg color, catching tokens that are defined in the registry and
  referenced in code but silently fall through build_stylesheet() without
  being wired to actual colors

Also updates beads issue tracker and last-touched pointer.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
